sentences.target: Le passager descend au prochain arrêt.

translations.fr: Le passager descend au prochain arrêt.
translations.en: The passenger gets off at the next stop.
translations.es: El pasajero se baja en la próxima parada.
translations.de: Der Fahrgast steigt an der nächsten Haltestelle aus.
translations.it: Il passeggero scende alla prossima fermata.
translations.pt: O passageiro desce na próxima parada.
translations.vi: Hành khách xuống ở điểm dừng tiếp theo.
translations.nl: De passagier stapt uit bij de volgende halte.
translations.hu: Az utas a következő megállónál leszáll.
translations.hi: यात्री अगले स्टॉप पर उतरता है.
translations.el: Ο επιβάτης κατεβαίνει στην επόμενη στάση.
translations.nb: Passasjeren går av på neste stopp.
translations.sv: Passageraren kliver av vid nästa hållplats.
translations.da: Passageren står af ved næste stoppested.
translations.ja: 乗客は次の停留所で降ります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of the head noun 'passager'.
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of 'descend'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Simple preposition 'à' fused with definite article 'le' (contraction 'à + le'); introduces the prepositional phrase headed by 'arrêt'.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; modifies 'arrêt'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Je cherche un passager avec une valise.

translations.fr: Je cherche un passager avec une valise.
translations.en: I'm looking for a passenger with a suitcase.
translations.es: Busco a un pasajero con una maleta.
translations.de: Ich suche einen Fahrgast mit einem Koffer.
translations.it: Cerco un passeggero con una valigia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一位拿着行李箱的乘客。
translations.yue: 我搵緊一位拎住喼嘅乘客。
translations.pt: Procuro um passageiro com uma mala.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một hành khách có vali.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een passagier met een koffer.
translations.hi: मैं एक सूटकेस वाले यात्री को ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en passasjer med en koffert.
translations.id: Saya mencari seorang penumpang yang membawa koper.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en passagerare med en resväska.
translations.ro: Caut un pasager cu o valiză.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en passager med en kuffert.
translations.ja: スーツケースを持った乗客を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'cherche'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'passager'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a comitative/instrumental prepositional phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement (object) of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu peux aider le passager derrière toi.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ede lə pasaʒe dɛʁjɛʁ twa/

translations.fr: Tu peux aider le passager derrière toi.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ede lə pasaʒe dɛʁjɛʁ twa/
translations.en: Can you help the passenger behind you?
translations.es: Puedes ayudar al pasajero detrás de ti.
translations.de: Du kannst dem Fahrgast hinter dir helfen.
translations.it: Puoi aiutare il passeggero dietro di te.
translations.ko: 뒤에 있는 승객을 도와줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以帮助你身后的乘客。
translations.yue: 你可以幫你後面嗰位乘客。
translations.ru: Ты можешь помочь пассажиру позади тебя.
translations.pt: Você pode ajudar o passageiro atrás de você.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giúp hành khách phía sau bạn.
translations.nl: Je kunt de passagier achter je helpen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш допомогти пасажиру позаду тебе.
translations.hi: आप अपने पीछे वाले यात्री की मदद कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βοηθήσεις τον επιβάτη πίσω σου.
translations.nb: Du kan hjelpe passasjeren bak deg.
translations.id: Kamu bisa membantu penumpang di belakangmu.
translations.sv: Du kan hjälpa passageraren bakom dig.
translations.ro: Poți să ajuți pasagerul din spatele tău.
translations.da: Du kan hjælpe passageren bag dig.
translations.ja: 後ろの乗客を手伝うことができます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects infinitival complement 'aider'.
Infinitive main verb controlled by the modal; takes 'le passager' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'passager'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'aider'.
Preposition; introduces a locative complement specifying position relative to 'toi'.
Stressed personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; complement of the preposition 'derrière'.

sentences.target: Ce passager a perdu son billet.

translations.fr: Ce passager a perdu son billet.
translations.de: Dieser Fahrgast hat sein Ticket verloren.
translations.it: Questo passeggero ha perso il suo biglietto.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位乘客丢了他的车票。
translations.yue: 呢位乘客唔見咗佢張車票。
translations.pt: Este passageiro perdeu o seu bilhete.
translations.he: הנוסע הזה איבד את הכרטיס שלו.
translations.vi: Hành khách này đã làm mất vé của mình.
translations.nl: Deze passagier is zijn kaartje kwijt.
translations.hu: Ez az utas elvesztette a jegyét.
translations.hi: इस यात्री ने अपना टिकट खो दिया है.
translations.el: Αυτός ο επιβάτης έχασε το εισιτήριό του.
translations.nb: Denne passasjeren har mistet billetten sin.
translations.sv: Den här passageraren har tappat sin biljett.
translations.da: Denne passager har mistet sin billet.
translations.ja: この乗客は切符をなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the referent noun 'passager'.
Common noun, masculine singular; syntactic subject of the verb phrase 'a perdu'.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect with past participle 'perdu'.
Past participle functioning as the main verb in a compound tense; transitive, governing the direct object 'son billet'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; agrees with 'billet' and marks 3rd-person possession.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'perdu'.
